summary: Retest of iteration_3 integration bug (patient pages calling admin-only /users?role=médecin and getting 403). Fix VERIFIED. Logged in as patient1@email.com/patient123 and exercised all 4 requested flows. Zero 403 responses observed on /patient, /patient/appointments, /patient/consultations or the booking flow. The patient now sees their data: 'Prochains rendez-vous (2)' + 'Historique (6)' on the appointments page (with doctor names like Dr. Diop Amadou, Dr. Sy, Dr. Ndiaye, Dr. Fall correctly resolved via /users/medecins) and 3 consultations on the consultations page (Dr. Diop Amadou - Pédiatrie). Booking end-to-end re-verified: clicked 'Prendre un rendez-vous' -> selected doctor in rdv-medecin -> filled rdv-date (2026-08-15T14:30) -> submitted rdv-btn -> redirected to /patient/appointments -> the new entry 'samedi 15 août 10:30 / Dr. Diop Amadou / Pédiatrie' is visible with 'En attente' badge, and Prochains rendez-vous counter moved from 2 to 3.
critical_code_review_comments: PatientAppointmentsList.js and PatientConsultationsList.js both still fetch the full /patients list and .find(p => p.user_id === user.id) to identify the current patient. Patients can only see their own record so it works, but a dedicated /patients/me endpoint would be cleaner and avoid the 307 trailing-slash redirect.

PatientAppointmentForm.js: form does not enforce min=now on the datetime input, so a past datetime can still be submitted. Recommend adding min={new Date().toISOString().slice(0,16)} to the rdv-date input.

Date filtering in PatientAppointmentsList.js uses string comparison (a.date_rdv >= now) on ISO strings. Works for the same TZ format the backend returns, but a Date() comparison would be safer if the API ever returns timestamps without timezone info.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 additional appointment via UI during retest: Dr. Diop Amadou, 2026-08-15 14:30, status 'En attente'. Now patient1 has 3 upcoming + 6 historique = 9 total appointments.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The /users?role=médecin -> /users/medecins fix is fully validated for both PatientAppointmentsList.js and PatientConsultationsList.js. Patient dashboard also no longer fires any 403. Booking flow remains green (toast + redirect + visible list entry). No further action required for this bug.
rca of the issue: Confirmed FIXED. PatientAppointmentsList.js line 32 and PatientConsultationsList.js line 28 now both call api.get('/users/medecins') which is accessible to any authenticated user (including patient role). Promise.all no longer rejects, so setAppointments / setConsultations + medecinsMap are properly populated and rendered. Verified directly in browser: console shows 0 x 403 across the 4 tested flows.
